title: veronica alpina subsp. minuscularia
intro: Veronica alpina subsp. minuscularia, also known as small alpine speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Veronica alpina subsp. minuscularia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
